decisions.citation_anchor: Hybrid — short inline quote (~10 words) + 'Verify' expand-to-context link that jumps to the full transcript segment
decisions.citation_default_visibility: Hidden behind 'Verify' toggle (default off) — clean artifact by default, trust signal on demand
decisions.low_confidence_handling: Flag with low-confidence marker ('Inferred — no direct quote') and lower visual weight; surface the item but make uncertainty explicit
decisions.epoch_trigger: Token-threshold — epoch fires when rolling window approaches the token budget ceiling (~800K of 1M tokens)
decisions.epoch_summary_content: Full structured summary: decisions + action items + key points + speaker attribution per chunk
decisions.epoch_overflow_strategy: sqlite-vec RAG over epoch summaries — epoch summaries are chunked, embedded, and indexed into sqlite-vec in the same SQLCipher DB; live assistant retrieves top-N relevant summaries per query
decisions.live_assistant_activation: On-demand only — activated by hotkey or trigger keyword; no passive LLM loop during meeting

questions.selected: Full structured summary (decisions + action items + key points + speaker attribution)
sqlite-vec RAG over epoch summaries (kept in spec)

discussion_log.freeform_notes: User clarified: live assistant is on-demand only (not always-on). Architecture adjusted: passive path is transcript accumulation + epoch summarization only (no LLM during meeting). LLM fires only on live assistant trigger and at end-of-meeting batch.
